title: Live price alerts system
label: Build
description: Live price alert watcher that monitors stock prices every 60s during market hours and fires alerts to Mission Control when key levels are hit (stop loss, starter buy zone, breakout, breakdown). Reads from data/alerts.json, logs to data/fired-alerts.json, posts messages via MC API.
lastUpdate: Built scripts/price-alert-watcher.js — polls Yahoo Finance every 60s during market hours (9:30–4:00 ET weekdays), evaluates 4 alert types (stop_loss, starter_buy, breakout, breakdown), posts fired alerts to Mission Control API at /api/tasks/messages, and persists fired alerts to data/fired-alerts.json to prevent re-firing. Sample alert config created at data/alerts.json with IONQ, NVDA, and PLTR examples.

title: Auto-rescore on earnings/news
label: Build
description: Build a system that auto-rescores Graham's watchlist stocks weekly using fresh Yahoo Finance data. Scores update automatically. Flags stocks where the thesis has changed (delta > 1.5 pts).
lastUpdate: Built scripts/auto-rescore.js — fetches fresh Yahoo Finance data (financialData, defaultKeyStatistics, earnings, upgradeDowngradeHistory, summaryDetail, insiderHolders, calendarEvents + v8 chart for RSI/MA/volume) for all 9 stocks on the Graham board. Computes 8-dimension scores (0–8 each, 64 max): revenue growth, earnings quality, analyst sentiment, technical momentum, valuation (PEG proxy), balance sheet, insider activity, catalyst pipeline. Compares to previous scores in data/stock-scores.json and flags thesis changes (delta > 1.5 pts). Initial run scores: APP 50, PLTR 49, AXON 46, MELI 44, NU 44, CRWD 43, RKLB 41, TEM 40, ASTS 38. Mission Control /scores page added with 8-dimension breakdown cards, thesis-change flags in orange, and ▶ Run Rescore button → POST /api/rescore. Sidebar nav entry added. API route at mission-control-app/src/app/api/rescore/route.ts. Log written to data/rescore-log.json.

title: Backtesting engine
label: Build
description: Build a backtesting engine that tests Graham's buy zones against 2 years of Yahoo Finance historical data. Results page at /backtest in Mission Control.
lastUpdate: Built scripts/backtest-engine.js — fetches 2y daily data from Yahoo Finance for each stock with a defined buy zone, finds first entry at or below the zone price (±2% threshold), computes return %, win/loss, and max drawdown. Initial run: 6/6 win rate (100%), avg return +174%. Results written to data/backtest-results.json. Mission Control /backtest page with summary tiles, results table (ticker, stage, buy zone, entry, current, return, win/loss badge, max drawdown), and Run Backtest button hooked to POST /api/backtest. Sidebar nav entry added.
